title: ExternalLibrary trait and closed C/POSIX registry in analysis

source.subject: feat(analysis): add ExternalLibrary trait + closed C/POSIX registry

body:
Analysis pipeline registers **ExternalLibrary** metadata through a closed registry consumed by foreign import and FFI lowering.

## Platform specification

- **Foreign libraries** — `/platform-spec/language-meta/interop/foreign-libraries` — *implements* (required)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`d292535`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/d292535)
- **Subject:** feat(analysis): add ExternalLibrary trait + closed C/POSIX registry
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `analysis-pipeline`
- **Domain:** `compiler`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-analysis-interop`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Analysis interop & codegen polish** (`v03-analysis-interop`). Normative spec: **Foreign libraries** (*implements*).
